title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero of Cursor discusses how most companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants. He argues the real bottleneck lies across the entire SDLC, not just code writing, and describes how Cursor builds agentic systems for bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and PM/EM workflows. He covers organizational shifts needed to move beyond the productivity plateau.
